scripts.packages:build: npm run build --workspace=@packages/enum && npm run build --workspace=@packages/types && npm run build --workspace=@packages/utils
scripts.setup:data: mkdir apps\backend\data\bathymetry_rasters && curl -L https://pharos-bathymetry-bucket.s3.eu-central-1.amazonaws.com/bathymetry_rasters.zip -o bathymetry_rasters.zip && tar -xf bathymetry_rasters.zip -C app/backend/data/bathymetry_rasters/ && del bathymetry_rasters.zip
